title: Explosive Chickens Datapack
description: Datapack make chicken speedy speedy boom boom.
body:
This datapack gives chickens speed 4 and makes them target players and then explode once within 5 blocks of the player. I decided to upload this to see if others would enjoy my projects as much as I do. To install simply download the zip file and when creating a world click on Data Packs (The Data Packs button is in the more section in 1.20), drag the data pack into the window, select the data pack, click done, and then create the world.

Working MC Versions - 1.17, 1.18, 1.19, and 1.20

Native MC Version - 1.19

That is all, have fun!
